title: convolvulus cephalophorus
intro: Convolvulus cephalophorus, also known as the Mediterranean bindweed or goat's head, is a species of flowering plant in the morning glory family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Convolvulus cephalophorus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
